r(c,{Q;N;U,d,F;v;u},I,S)end return Q end,function(c)local r,I=1,(c)[1]while I do(u)[I],r=(u)[I]-1,r+1 if(u)[I]==0 then(u)[I],(v)[I]=nil,nil end I=(c)[r]end end,function(c,I)local S=D(I)local Q=function(Q,N,U,d,F)return r(c,{Q,N;U,d,F},I,S)end return Q end return(M(1016208,{}))(S(F))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or(table)[I(26769)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
